rationale: The response notices the repeated pattern as form fields patching process leaks and names the upstream issue as missing pre-action confirmation closure. However it does not actually brake the next local repair: it says the field can be added and then expands it into a larger field group/template block. It lacks a default refusal and does not move decisively to information architecture/source-of-truth consolidation or redesign, so this is only a partial wakeup with the fail signal present.
